name: unbrowse
description: Unbrowse — api native browser MCP/SDK for any agent. Auto-discovers APIs from browser traffic, generates skills on the fly to call APIs directly 100x faster, 80% cheaper locally.
readme_summary: Unbrowse is a local Model Context Protocol (MCP) server and CLI that transforms websites into reusable API interfaces for agents. It captures network traffic, reverse-engineers API endpoints, and stores learned information in a marketplace for instant reuse, significantly improving agent efficiency and reducing costs.
key_features: Local MCP server and CLI
Auto-discovery of APIs from browser traffic
Generates reusable API interfaces (skills) on the fly
Significantly faster and cheaper than traditional browser flows
Shared marketplace for learned API contracts
Security focused: capture and execution stay local by default
Drop-in replacement for OpenClaw / agent-browser flows
primary_use_case: To enable AI agents to interact with websites by automatically reverse-engineering and creating reusable API interfaces, making web automation faster, cheaper, and more efficient.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled cartographer in a bustling, futuristic workshop meticulously drawing a detailed map of a complex website. The website's interface is represented as a sprawling, intricate cityscape. The cartographer uses a magical quill that captures data streams flowing from the city, transforming them into clean, well-defined API routes on the map. Small, glowing icons representing different agent tools hover around the workshop. The map itself is the output, clearly showing discoverable and callable endpoints. The scene is lit with a warm, inviting glow, emphasizing clarity and efficiency. The style is a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic, highlighting the transformation of raw web traffic into structured, usable APIs.

name: taskt
description: taskt (pronounced 'tasked' and formely sharpRPA) is free and open-source robotic process automation (rpa) built in C# powered by the .NET Framework
readme_summary: taskt is a free and open-source Robotic Process Automation (RPA) tool built with C# and the .NET Framework. It allows users to design and build automation scripts without extensive coding, featuring a visual bot designer, element recorder, and screen recorder.
key_features: Free and open-source RPA client
Built in C#/.NET Framework
No-code bot design with visual designer
Element recorder and screen recorder
Automation for web and desktop applications
Custom Code command for .NET DLLs and services
Optional server component for remote execution and orchestration
Apache 2.0 License
primary_use_case: Automating repetitive, rule-based tasks across desktop and web applications without requiring deep programming knowledge.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, anthropomorphic robot butler meticulously organizing a chaotic desk filled with papers, coffee cups, and digital screens. The robot is using a glowing wand to sort documents into neat stacks and digitally file them into a floating 'taskt' cloud icon. Small, subtle UI elements resembling the taskt bot designer appear on a nearby screen, showing the automation flow. The scene is bright and clean, with a 3D isometric illustration style, emphasizing efficiency and ease of use. The overall mood is helpful and productive, with a soft, digital glow emanating from the robot's actions.

name: bluehood
description: Monitor your local neighbourhood's bluetooth activity
readme_summary: Bluehood is a Python-based project that monitors and analyzes Bluetooth activity in a local neighborhood. It identifies and classifies nearby Bluetooth devices, tracks their presence patterns over time, and provides a web dashboard for visualization and analysis, aiming to raise awareness about Bluetooth privacy risks.
key_features: Continuous scanning for BLE and Classic Bluetooth devices
Device identification by vendor and BLE service UUIDs
Device classification into categories (phones, audio, vehicles, etc.)
Tracking presence patterns with hourly/daily heatmaps
Filtering out randomized MAC addresses
Analysis of device correlations
Push notifications for device arrival/departure
Web dashboard for monitoring and analysis
MAC address vendor lookup
Signal strength (RSSI) history
Customizable device grouping and naming
Heartbeat check-in for uptime monitoring
Storage rotation for data pruning
primary_use_case: To monitor, analyze, and visualize local Bluetooth device activity for educational purposes, raising awareness about Bluetooth privacy and potential metadata leakage.
cover_image_prompt: A curious cartographer in a cozy, dimly lit room, surrounded by maps and old books. They are using a magical, glowing compass that points not north, but towards faint, ethereal outlines of everyday objects like smartphones, headphones, and cars that are subtly visible through the walls of their house. The compass needle is actively tracing paths and patterns on a large, unfolding map spread across their desk, highlighting clusters and timelines of these invisible signals. Small, stylized icons representing Bluetooth symbols and data streams float gently in the air around the cartographer, connecting the compass to the map. The overall mood is one of discovery and subtle revelation, emphasizing the unseen digital world around us. The art style should be a warm, inviting digital painting with a focus on atmospheric lighting and clear, illustrative details.

name: scientific-agent-skills
description: A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.
readme_summary: Scientific Agent Skills provides a comprehensive collection of 138 pre-built skills for AI agents, enabling them to perform complex scientific and research workflows across various domains like bioinformatics, drug discovery, and materials science. These skills adhere to the open Agent Skills standard, ensuring broad compatibility with different AI agent frameworks.
key_features: 138 ready-to-use scientific and research skills
Supports the open Agent Skills standard for broad compatibility

Covers diverse scientific domains including bioinformatics, cheminformatics, drug discovery, proteomics, clinical research, healthcare AI, medical imaging, machine learning, materials science, physics, astronomy, and engineering
Enables AI agents to execute complex multi-step scientific workflows
Works with AI agents like Cursor, Claude Code, and Codex
Includes skills for over 100 scientific databases
primary_use_case: To empower AI agents with specialized capabilities to execute complex scientific research and analysis tasks across multiple disciplines.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, ancient alchemist in a futuristic laboratory, surrounded by glowing vials and complex scientific instruments. The alchemist is meticulously arranging a series of interconnected, luminous gears and conduits, each representing a different scientific discipline (e.g., DNA helix, molecular structure, astronomical chart). These elements are channeling streams of data, transforming raw information into elegant, holographic scientific visualizations and research reports that float around the alchemist. Subtle UI elements showing code snippets and database connections are integrated into the lab's consoles. The overall mood is one of discovery and advanced knowledge, rendered in a detailed 3D isometric illustration style with a vibrant, ethereal color palette.

name: sub2api
description: Sub2API 一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、Openai 、Gemini、Antigravity订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。
readme_summary: Sub2API is an open-source AI API gateway platform that centralizes access to various AI services like Claude, OpenAI, and Gemini. It allows users to share subscription quotas, manage API keys, and handle authentication, billing, and request forwarding, making AI service access more efficient and cost-effective.
key_features: Multi-Account Management
API Key Distribution
Precise Billing (Token-level)
Smart Scheduling (Sticky Sessions)
Concurrency Control
Rate Limiting
Built-in Payment System (EasyPay, Alipay, WeChat Pay, Stripe)
Admin Dashboard
External System Integration (iframe)
primary_use_case: To act as a unified gateway for accessing and managing multiple AI service subscriptions, enabling efficient quota distribution, cost-sharing, and streamlined API key management for users.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, bustling marketplace where diverse AI service icons (like Claude, OpenAI, Gemini) are displayed on stalls. A central, friendly 'API Gateway' character, perhaps a stylized robot or a helpful merchant, is efficiently distributing unique, glowing 'API Key' tokens to various users (developers, students) who are then seamlessly accessing the AI services. The scene should convey efficiency, sharing, and unified access, with subtle UI elements showing usage stats and cost breakdowns. The overall mood is collaborative and technologically advanced, rendered in a clean, 3D isometric illustration style with a bright, inviting color palette, subtly featuring the 'Sub2API' logo on the gateway character or a prominent stall.

name: superset
description: Code Editor for the AI Agents Era - Run an army of Claude Code, Codex, etc. on your machine
readme_summary: Superset is a desktop application designed to orchestrate and manage multiple AI coding agents, such as Claude Code and Codex, in parallel. It provides a unified interface for running these agents on local development tasks, isolating each agent's work in separate git worktrees for better organization and preventing interference.
key_features: Parallel execution of multiple AI coding agents
Worktree isolation for each agent task
Agent monitoring and notification system
Built-in diff viewer for reviewing agent changes
Universal compatibility with any CLI agent
IDE integration for seamless workflow handoff
Workspace presets for automated environment setup
primary_use_case: To enable developers to run and manage multiple AI coding agents simultaneously on their local machine, streamlining parallel development workflows and improving coding efficiency.
cover_image_prompt: A conductor standing on a podium in a bustling digital orchestra pit, with multiple AI agents (represented as distinct, glowing robotic figures with coding interfaces) playing different instruments in perfect harmony. The conductor waves a baton, directing the flow of code and data streams (visualized as glowing lines) between the agents and a central, large monitor displaying a complex but organized codebase. Subtle UI elements and code snippets float around the scene, indicating the integrated nature of the tool. The overall mood is one of efficient, collaborative creation. Style: 3D isometric illustration with vibrant, tech-focused colors and clear visual metaphors for parallel processing and orchestration.
